ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1530-1532 Geneva Ave, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay for Francys Knowles.
Joe Corey for Patrita Callejan (Trustee of the Cermeno Living Trust).
Jenny Negron also present.

100% of the property is being sold. The Estate owns 50% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $1,420,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 19, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $665,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To Jun-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Corey for and with Petrita Callaghan (Petitioner).
Nicholas Jay for and with Francys Knowles (Objector/Petitioner).

Mr. Corey stated that the Daughter has priority, but he believes she is disqualified under Probate Code 8502, that there are grounds for disqualification, that Ms. Knowles wasted, mismanaged and clearly neglected the Estate, that the Father passed away in 2012 and that Ms. Knowles did nothing until the Aunt filed a petition. Mr. Corey also stated that there is contention between the Parties, that Ms. Knowles physically assaulted his Client and her Daughter, and that there is a need for a Special Administrator. Mr. Jay stated that no objection was filed. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation (copy provided to Counsel in open Court). Mediation must be completed no later than June 20, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 22, 2017. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to and the Parties are to return on June 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To Jun-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
